title: Le Bro Mod
description: A small Vanilla++ modpack based on Fabulously Optimized.
body:
# Le Bro Mod

Based on the very good [Fabulously Optimized 5.4.1](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized/version/5.4.1) modpack for the best performance.

This modpack is designed as a Vanilla++ modpack, including a relatively low number of mods.\
It is mainly focused on improving and expanding the Overworld, with few modifications to the Nether and End dimensions.

---

## Features

### Exploration

Worlds created by Le Bro Mod are full of surprises:

- Modded terrain generation by [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith)
- Refreshed Minecraft structures with almost all the mods from [YUNG](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG)
- New structures (villages, dungeons, etc) from [When Dungeons Arise](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise), [Explorify](https://modrinth.com/datapack/explorify), [ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village) and [Towns and Towers](https://modrinth.com/mod/towns-and-towers)

### Gameplay

A Vanilla++ experience:

- Craft new armors and tools beyond Netherite with [Advanced Netherite](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-netherite) or find your new style with the [Immersive Armors](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-armors)
- Explore the world to find and defeat the [Bosses of Mass Destruction](https://modrinth.com/mod/bosses-of-mass-destruction) or to complete your collection of artifacts and fossils from [Better Archeology](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-archeology)
- Enjoy simple technology and automatization from [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) and many of its plugins
- Bored of simple chests and barrels? All your storage needs will be satisfied with [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks-(unoffical-fabric-port)), [Sophisticated Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-storage-(unofficial-fabric-port)), [Extended Drawers](https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-drawers) and [Tom's Simple Storage Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage)

### Building and Decoration

Enjoy new blocks to build and decorate all your projects:

- Tired of the poor choice of doors, windows, roofs, etc? [Macaw](https://modrinth.com/user/sketchmacaw) is at your rescue with all of their mods
- Want more types of blocks? [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped) is here to indulge you

### And many more...

List of all the added mods is just below, feel free to explore it!

---
